summary: The diff updates `illustrationAlt` text in `frontend/src/lib/comicData.ts` (at least for panels 02, 05, 07, and starts 10), but provides no evidence that the actual illustration image assets under `frontend/public/assets/generated/` were updated. Additional changes include modifications to `frontend-file-summaries.txt` and `project_state.json`, which were not requested by the BuildRequest.

missing_requirements.requirement: Update the comic panel illustration assets so that Miles Morales is visually depicted as Black in any panel where he is shown (including panels where he is clearly visible, in shadow, or partially visible).
missing_requirements.reason: No image/asset files under `frontend/public/assets/generated/` are shown as modified in the diff summary; only code/metadata files were modified.
evidence: File diff summary shows Modified: 3 (frontend/src/lib/comicData.ts, frontend-file-summaries.txt, project_state.json) and no asset/image paths

missing_requirements.requirement: Ensure the fight/action scenes are represented with comic-style pictures (not blank/missing/placeholder visuals) by updating the existing fight-scene illustration assets to clearly read as comic panels with dynamic action composition.
missing_requirements.reason: There is no evidence of updated fight-scene illustration image assets (e.g., panel-07, panel-19, panel-20) in `frontend/public/assets/generated/`; only alt text updates are visible.
evidence: File diff summary shows no modified files in frontend/public/assets/generated/
frontend/src/lib/comicData.ts (truncated) shows alt text change for panel 07 but no asset changes

missing_requirements.requirement: Revise `illustrationAlt` strings in `frontend/src/lib/comicData.ts` for panels featuring Miles and for the fight/action panels so the alt text accurately describes the updated visuals in clear English.

It does not provide evidence that all specified Miles panels (10, 14, 16, 17, 18) and fight/action panels (07, 19, 20) have had their `illustrationAlt` revised.
evidence: frontend/src/lib/comicData.ts (truncated): shows updated illustrationAlt for panels 02, 05, 07 and begins panel 10 before truncation

hallucinated_features.reason: The BuildRequest asks for asset updates and alt text updates; it does not request updating internal `project_state.json`.
